comments.author: reviewer1
comments.body: Shouldn't this handle the case where `entry` is undefined? `store.get` can miss.

reviewThreads.draft: Good catch — fixed in `abc1234`. `get()` now returns early on a cache miss before touching `entry.expiresAt`, and there's a new unit test covering the miss path.

comments.author: reviewer2
comments.body: Why warm the cache eagerly at startup? This could slow down boot.

comments.author: astromar96
comments.body: It cut p99 latency in staging, but I'm open to making it lazy.

reviewThreads.draft: Warming is async and doesn't block the listen call — boot time is unaffected (measured ~3ms overhead). Happy to gate it behind a config flag if you'd prefer it opt-in.

issueComments.author: reviewer2
issueComments.body: Can you also update the changelog before merging?
issueComments.draft:
> Can you also update the changelog before merging?

@reviewer2 Done in `def5678` — added under Unreleased.
